proposal_summary: Gauntlet recommends decreasing the Collateral Factor by 5% for various Compound v2 collateral assets (AAVE, BAT, COMP, LINK, MKR, SUSHI, UNI, YFI, ZRX) as part of Phase 11 of the v2 deprecation.

disclosed_entities.name: cToken contracts
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: updates the parameters using the _setCollateralFactor method of the relevant cToken contracts.

disclosed_entities.name: Gauntlet
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Gauntlet recommends decreasing the Collateral Factor for v2 collateral assets.

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Decreases the Collateral Factor for AAVE, BAT, COMP, LINK, MKR, SUSHI, UNI, YFI, and ZRX by up to 5% to further deprecate the v2 market.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: Decrease AAVE Collateral Factor from 38% to 33% ... updates the parameters using the _setCollateralFactor method

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal only consists of routine collateral factor parameter updates.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence:
Simple Summary
For Phase 11 of the Compound v2 deprecation, Gauntlet recommends decreasing the Collateral Factor for v2 collateral assets.

disclosed_functions.textual_evidence: The proposal updates the parameters using the _setCollateralFactor method of the relevant cToken contracts.

limitations: No explicit contract addresses are provided in the proposal text, so it is impossible to verify the exact targets purely from this text.
